title: Check the title and favicon of the application
description: When user lands on login page they should be able to see correct title and favicon
steps_result:
1. "Favicon should be present"
2. "Page Title should be present"
parameters:
Favicon:As mentioned in design document
Page Title:OrengeHRM

title: Check UI as with respect to design document
Check place holder is getting disappear when user start writing
Check user gets required message if they left User name and password field blank after start typing.
Check user gets required message when they initiate by entering only space in User name and password field.
Check Username field taking alphanumeric character and symbols as input.
Check character entered in Password field are masked and toggle eye getting displayed when user startstyping.
Check user gets invalid credential message when try to login with invalid credentials.
Check user navigates to forget password page when they click on forget password link.
Check user navigates to Orange HRM landing page when they click on OrangeHRM.inc link.
Check all mentioned social media icon navigates to respective page when user click on them.
Check user able to login with valid credentials and land on Dashboard page.
Verify System Users Fields
description:
System User consists of 
Username
User Role
Employee Name
Status
preconditions:
* Log in with valid credentials 
* Go to Admin tab and select user from user management tab
steps_result:
1. "1. It should be a text box.
2. The text box should validate for the existing records.
3. This field should not be a mandatory field for search."
2. "1. It should be a drop down field.
2. The drop down should validate for existing records.
3. This field should not be a mandatory field for search."

title: Verify User Record Table
steps_actions:
1. "Verify the availability of the columns in user record table."
2. "Verify sorting functionality"
3. "Verify check selection functionality of line items."
4. "Verify Action for line items."
	1. "Verify Delete Functionality"
	2. "Verify Edit Functionality"
steps_result:
1. "The following column should be available in the table :

1. Username
2. User Role
3. Employee Name
4. Status
5. Actions"
2. "Sorting should be available for the following columns in ascending and descending order.

1. Username
2. User Role
3. Employee Name
4. Status"
3. "1. When one of the line item is checked or selected then delete selected button should be visible to delete selected record.
2. When the master checkbox in the header is checked then delete selected should also be visible to delete all selected record"
4. "The action elements should be available for all the line items."
	1. "When user clicks on delete icon the complete line item should be deleted."
	2. "When user clicks on edit icon it should navigate to edit user page to update user data."

title: Verify UI with respect to design document
Verify all modules and sub-modules present in left navigation bar and top navigation bar getting highlighted upon mouse hover.
Verify default landing page in PIM is Employee list
Verify navigation bar expand button
Verify user can access all sub-module by clicking on it and sub module present in configuration dropdown getting displayed upon click.
Verify user is able to navigate to help page by clicking Help button
Verify tooltip is getting displayed for required field.
Verify the UI with respect to design document.
Verify mandatory field should be star marked.
Verify saving the employee without filling mandatory field.
Verify with entering valid employee data for all the fields.
Verify user able to create employee only by filling required field.
Check place holder is getting disappear when user start writing
Check user gets required message if user left first name and last name field blank after start typing.
Check user gets required message when they initiate by entering only space in first name and last name field.
Verify Employee full name input box field taking alphanumeric character and symbols as input.
Verify space present before the employee's name and after the name will not get saved
Verify only single space is allowed between words
Verify Employee ID is auto generated and is editable.
